case_title: SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS, LP VS. TANESHA MONROE ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONROE, TANESHA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 79 BEATRICE LANE #1, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS, LP

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS, LP SERVED JUL-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-20-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT MONROE, TANESHA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS, LP SERVED JUL-20-2017, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MONROE, TANESHA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
